title: Headstones
description: Don't lose your precious items when you die!
body:
## A completely new version is being _slowly_ worked on! Some new features, more customization options, and many bug fixes while still being simple to use and intuitive! P.S. I have a full-time job so I cannot give ETAs, it will be ready when it will be ready :)
P.P.S. Still working on it as for 09/04/2026! # Headstones _Don't lose your precious items when you die!_ ![](https://i.imgur.com/APOieA9.png) **Headstones** is a plugin that adds a simple mechanic to the game:
When a player dies, its inventory and experience will be **safely stored** in a *headstone*. To get the stuff back, only the player who died can break its headstone. ## Commands **/headstones**- Shows my name and the plugin's version.
**/hs reload** *headstones.reload* - Reloads the configuration and translations file.
**/hs cleardb** *headstones.cleardb* - Dangerous command to make all the existing heastones useless. ## Permissions **headstones.keep-experience** - Allows the player to get his **experience** back when he breaks its headstone.
**headstones.keep-inventory** - Same as above but for the **inventory**(items).
### Need help? Feel free to [DM me on Spigot](https://www.spigotmc.org/conversations/add?to=alex3025) or reach me out on Discord: **@alex3025**
